cards.headline_signal: You're booking patients online but can't measure which services are converting or where they're coming from.
cards.outreach_angle: The frustration of knowing your booking system works, but flying blind on ROI and patient sources.
evidence_statements: WordPress website with booking system installed, but zero conversion tracking configured — no way to measure which high-value services (implants, orthodontics) are actually converting from online visitors.
Offering $4k-6k implant and orthodontics services but running zero paid ads to capture high-intent local searches in competitive Greater Melbourne dental market.
Zero Google reviews and no verified GMB profile despite having 6-20 staff — invisible in local search results when patients search 'dentist near me' or 'dental implants Melbourne'.
Online booking capability live on website but no Meta Pixel installed — can't retarget patients interested in high-value treatments across Facebook/Instagram.
cards.draft_email_subject: Why your Smile Solutions booking data isn't being tracked
cards.draft_email_body:
Hi Amy,

I was reviewing Smile Solutions' website and noticed you've got a solid online booking system in place — which is great. But I didn't see conversion tracking installed on it, so right now you're booking patients without knowing which services are actually converting or which channels they're coming from.

For a practice offering high-value services like implants and orthodontics, that's a pretty expensive blind spot. Even a basic setup would show you exactly which of your 8 service categories is driving real revenue online.

Would you be open to a quick 15-minute call to walk through what's actually happening with your bookings right now?

Cheers,
{{agency_name}}

With your foundation already in place, scaling campaigns by service tier (high-margin vs commodity) and segmenting audiences could move the needle pretty quickly. Are you currently doing any A/B testing on ad copy or audience targeting, or is it more of a set-and-forget setup right now?

Cheers,
{{agency_name}}
